entry.title: Muse Dash v1.5.30
entry.content:
# Changes - Adds support for Wuthering Waves Pioneer Podcast and Ay-Aye Horse - Fixed Master Bancho's Sushi Class not showing up.
# Installation ### Melonloader *Melonloader is required to play with this mod. However reinstalling it is not required on update.*
1. Download MelonLoader.Installer.exe from https://github.com/LavaGang/MelonLoader/releases/latest and run it. 2. Choose the automated tab, click the select button and browse to `MuseDash.exe`. - You can find the folder in steam by finding the game in your library, right clicking it and choosing *Manage→Browse Local Files*. - If you click the bar at the top telling you your current folder, this will give you a path you can copy. If you paste that into the window popped up by **MelonLoader**, it will automatically go to the same folder. 3. The launcher will automatically default to the latest version. - If the latest version is not working: **Untick Latest and select 0.6.6.** 4. Click install. Once finished run the game once.
### Mod Install
1.Download `ArchipelagoMuseDash.zip`. 2. Head to the Muse Dash folder and open up `/mods/`. 3. Extract the contents of the .zip file into mods. - Ensure that `ArchipelagoMuseDash.dll` and `Archipelago.MultiClient.Net.dll` are under `/mods/` and not within a sub folder. 4. Run the game. If a new button appears on the start screen the mod was installed correctly.

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Spirit Tracks v0.7.1
entry.content: Works with seeds generated in v0.7.0 [Setup guide and useful info](https://github.com/DayKat/spirit-tracks/blob/main/worlds/tloz_st/docs/setup.md) - fixed bug where your first rabbit caught would crash if caught the first time you entered the overworld - fixed bug where picking up the boss key in ToS 10F would crash due to faulty keyrings - tweaked some yaml wording - prevented Wadatsumi from being in pirate minigame while playing for the gorons - removed HC and Quiver from pirate hideout rewards for more minigame settings where they don't belong - fixed UT randomizing the bypass for ToS 5 - fixed train hiding in garage after getting Niko Stamp Book location

entry.title: Factorio: Space Age v2.0.1
entry.content:
# Factorio: Space Age apworld v2.0.1
* Fix corrupted apworld missing critical files. * Actually bump the version number in the apworld and mod.
download: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/releases . general docs: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/blob/space-age/worlds/factorio_space_age/docs/en_Factorio_Space_Age.md . setup guide: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/blob/space-age/worlds/factorio_space_age/docs/setup_en.md . source code: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/tree/space-age/worlds/factorio_space_age .

entry.title: Links Awakening DX Beta v13.4.1
entry.content: - Fix `--no-magpie` flag in client - Fix `improved_additional` warps setting - Fix follower setting

entry.title: Ratchet & Clank 2 v0.6.4.3
entry.content:
Testing Dynamic PINE ports for multi PCSX2 instance support. Also adds auto connection functionally to the client using patch data, and added the manifest json. Based on: https://github.com/evilwb/APRac2/releases/tag/v0.6.4 v0.6.4.2: Now also has UT integrated, and yaml-less support. Works as long as UT is installed. Also fixed some first person logic issues. Planned: More UT features. "Glitch" logic. Internal or external map. Auto map tab switching. Community suggested logic changes. v0.6.4.3 Actually made UT work, and added world version to slot data so can see if client isn't matching multiworld.
### Setup You need every RaC2 option in your `host.yaml` setup. That means: `iso_file` to a valid vanilla iso in your Archipelago directory (should be already from normal setup) `iso_start` to your PCSX2 exe (Make sure to use `/`) `game_ini` to a game settings file in your PCSX2's gamesettings folder. (Usually `%USERPROFILE%/Documents/PCSX2/gamesettings/SCUS-97268_38996035.ini`)
Example: ```yaml rac2_options: # File name of the Ratchet & Clank 2 ISO iso_file: "Ratchet & Clank - Going Commando (USA) (v1.01).iso" # Set this false to never autostart an iso (such as after patching), # Set it to true to have the operating system default program open the iso # Alternatively, set it to a path to a program to open the .iso file with (like PCSX2) iso_start: "C:/Emulators/(PS2) PCSX2/pcsx2-qt.exe" # Set to file path to an existing PCSX2 game setting INI file to have the patcher # create an appropriately named INI with the rest of the patch output. This can be used to # allow you to use you own custom PCSX2 setting with patched ISO. game_ini: "%USERPROFILE%/Documents/PCSX2/gamesettings/SCUS-97268_38996035.ini" ```
Game settings ini example: ```ini [EmuCore] EnablePINE = true PINESlot = 28011
[Achievements] Enabled = false
[MemoryCards] Slot1_Enable = true Slot2_Enable = false Slot1_Filename = APgames.ps2 ``` Recommended you use your settings for vanilla RaC2. But you can make a copy with specific edits. So you can set an AP specific memory card like in the example above. (You don't need to add PINE settings)
For normal setup if you haven't already. Check [GitHub](<https://github.com/evilwb/APRac2/blob/main/docs/setup_en.md>), and [Discord](<https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1325015730218860554/1371288772548755466>).
### Start Simply run a `.aprac2` file with Archipelago. (Recommended to set to open `.aprac2` files with Archipelago by default) Or run the client, and use the `/start` command, and then select your desired `.aprac2` file. (Or drag `.aprac2` into the client) Note: You can rename `aprac2` and patched `iso` but they have to have the same name or it'll make another `iso`. (Same way you have to keep `.apsave`, and their `.zip` name the same if hosting locally)
Changes: <https://github.com/jacobmix/APRac2/compare/v0.6.4.2...v0.6.4.3?w=1> Full changes: <https://github.com/jacobmix/APRac2/compare/main...v0.6.4.3?w=1>

entry.title: Elder Scrolls Online v0.3.0
entry.content: ## Bug Fixes: - Fixed issue with unlocked delves being treated as locked

entry.title: Mega Man Zero 3 v0.2.2
entry.content:
Sub Tanks have been implemented!
# Changes - Sub Tanks have been implemented as location checks and randomized items. - This update should have performance increases. It turns out you can read multiple slots of memory in one Bizhawk read/write statement. Very cool. - Fixed a bug where having multiple clients running on the same computer could cause the two games to incorrectly share inventory.

entry.title: Kingdom Hearts Dream Drop Distance v0.0.6
entry.content:
# Kingdom Hearts Dream Drop Distance Archipelago 0.0.6
*This version has **breaking** changes. Please do not update to this version if you have a run ongoing.* ### APWorld Changes - Fixed several logic issues in Traverse Town - Made socket non-blocking for better Linux compatibility - Defeating Ansem II now awards 3 checks (one for each boss in the gauntlet)
### AP Companion Changes - New AP Item Icon (Thanks Halrondo!) ***NEW QOL*** - Added a Report that details your Go Mode conditions and whether you have achieved them (can be found in Reports -> Glossaries) - All save points in a world will unlock after clearing that world - Available Flowmotion is now accurately reflected in action command inventory - A world item for TT2 now appears in inventory when it's accessible - Active Spirits are now affected by the EXP Multiplier - Spirit Rank now randomized when auto-crafting - Obtained Exp now restored after death *** BUG FIXES*** - Reworked some under-the-hood stuff for stability and performance (this involves making certain checks much less frequent, so please report if you encounter any oddities!) - Reworked EXP Multiplier to prevent early level up checks - Removed purgatory (maybe finally?) - Flick Rush option no longer sends the player to Traverse Town - Fixed a bug where certain rooms became inaccessible - Fixed a bug where action commands could not be equipped - Fixed an issue where spirits sent several level up prompts - Other minor fixes

entry.title: Warioworld v0.1.9.post4
entry.content: # Warioworld Archipelago v0.1.9 ### Additions > Added RingLink (all coins will count as 1 for balance purposes, you still lose the same amount of coins however) > Added SFX functionality for RingLink > Added PAL support (the Client will also apply a different patch depending on PAL or NTSC) # Fixes > Fixed going into/out of a Sublevel sending a DeathLink to other players > Fixed DeathLink not being received by Wario (no more favourable exchange rates for you sir!) > Fixed miscellaneous checks being given to you when they shouldn't > Fixed Chests randomly spawning without you hitting the Button > Fixed the logic for Clown-a-Round being incorrect (leading to the game thinking you had access when you did not) > Closing the game before the Client can sometimes send random checks and crash the Client > Fixed Client disconnecting when your Coin count goes below 0 # Known Bugs > The most recent item will be given to you again if it is a Filler/Trap item on reloading the savefile (this can softlock you if you have been given the Death Trap last, being sent another item will fix this) > Some checks need to be collected twice to register (this is random and inconsistent, even across savestates)

entry.title: Pokemon Black and White v0.3.27
entry.content:
# Changelog
- Fixed `Experience Multiplier` not automatically being set to the value specified in the yaml - Fixed `All Pokémon Seen` not being applied to the save file - Tried fixing a rare bug regarding the PopTracker pack and data storage - Removed `any_badge`/`any_tm_hm` from `Shuffle Badge Rewards`/`Shuffle TM Rewards` - Old yamls with these choices will instead interpret them as `shuffled` - Removed `Prioritize key item locations` from `Modify Logic` - Old yamls with this modifier will just ignore it
### Is this version compatible with older multiworld slots and save files? Yes, back to 0.3.0, except the pre-release 0.3.99(9) However, tracking worlds generated before 0.3.27 might show incorrect Dexsanity logic in UT
### Notes regarding the `pokemon_bw_without_maps.apworld` file That version does not contain the submaps for UT auto-tabbing, other than that it's identical to the full apworld. To install it, you have to either double klick it to install or manually rename it to `pokemon_bw.apworld`. It's only a fraction of the size of the full apworld and intended for people who don't use UT, which includes multiworld hosts.

entry.title: Mega Man Legends v0.2.5
entry.content:
# Changelog
## Bug Fixes - Fixed an issue with 'Rescue shop owners husband' location not releasing when the item was not on the player's slot

entry.title: YARG v0.0.11
entry.content:
# Use Client Version 0.0.5. No Client Update Required!
New: - Added YARN Request Pack 1
## What's Changed * Add instrument shuffle details to readme by @energymaster22 in https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/pull/20 * added YARN Request Pack 1 by @energymaster22 in https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/pull/22
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/compare/0.0.10...0.0.11

entry.title: Devil May Cry 3 v0.5.0
entry.content:
- Now uses the new and improved rewrite for archipelago_rs (Big kudos to @nex3) - Universal Tracker support, UT can work without the yaml. This also makes it so UT is aware of the random mission order - New Hint Game mode (This will appear as a separate client in the AP Launcher). Do Bloody Palace floors to generate hints! Number of floors needed per hint can be adjusted in the `host.yaml` - Purchasing blue/purple orbs can be checks. (Purchasing gun levels and skills checks will most likely come in a later update) - Red Orb Filler has been added (1000/2500/5000) to alleviate some grinding - Say goodbye to the bank system. Item Syncing has been re-written and is now based off of the currently loaded save slot - Skills are now properly given mid mission (and overall behave better) - Crystal skull location now works, oops - Re-organized where saves and sync data are. Files are now under `game_install/archipelago/(seed_{slot_name})/`
APWorld Specific: - SS Rank Checks can be entirely removed - There are a whole lot less generation failures now! - Gun upgrades are now classified as useful.

entry.title: Bloons TD6 v0.5.0
entry.content: - New Roundsanity option - New Progressive Prices option - New Category lock option - New Traps options - New Goal options

entry.title: Pokemon Black and White v0.3.28
entry.content:
# Changelog
- Fixed generation failures resulting from the last update
### Is this version compatible with older multiworld slots and save files? Yes, back to 0.3.0, except the pre-release 0.3.99(9) However, tracking worlds generated before 0.3.27 might show incorrect Dexsanity logic in UT
### Notes regarding the `pokemon_bw_without_maps.apworld` file That version does not contain the submaps for UT auto-tabbing, other than that it's identical to the full apworld. To install it, you have to either double klick it to install or manually rename it to `pokemon_bw.apworld`. It's only a fraction of the size of the full apworld and intended for people who don't use UT, which includes multiworld hosts.

entry.title: Autopelago v0.11.0
entry.content:
# https://autopelago.app
The game client has been completely rewritten from scratch. It runs in the browser now.
The .apworld now has a manifest, but has otherwise not changed since 0.10.3.
# Changes since 0.11.14
1. Fix an unnecessary error when connecting to multiworlds generated from APWorld files predating April 1, 2025. Ongoing support for multiworlds generated from old 0.x APWorld files is not guaranteed, but if the only thing I need to do is slightly tweak a version number check, then that's no big deal.
Everything from the original native version *should* be present in this one. If not, then that's a bug. Please report it.
# Other changes since 0.10.4
1. You no longer need to run any native executable files. It's a web app now, so just go to that URL. - If you want to self-host it, it's all static files - this release should have a "dist.zip" asset that you can just drop into any reasonable static web server. - You will **need** to self-host if you want it to work with an Archipelago server that doesn't use HTTPS. 2. You can now launch directly to the game if you know all the magical things to type into the URL fragment. This is mostly provided so you can refresh the page without having to click through the menu again. 3. As is web tradition, most errors that happen when the game is running will not automatically take you out of the game screen. Instead, they will just create banners along the top that you have to click to dismiss. Hopefully, this will never happen to you (of course, it happened to me constantly while developing this). 4. Not only is this a web app (and so it finally runs on Mac and Android), but it's a **progressive** web app. This means that you can "install" it as a native app on Android, even. 5. Interval between "when STILL blocked" messages is now configurable (though it's still got a minimum of 15 minutes so that you don't spam everyone). 6. There's now a separate "Connecting..." screen between the settings page and the main game screen, instead of showing a version of the game screen instantly and then modifying it once you're finally connected. 7. When you get disconnected for any reason (other than clicking the button to go back to the menu), you now get spat back to the same "Connecting..." screen (with a different message) and it will try to reconnect you automatically, at least once every 30 seconds. 8. The game version is now visible in the title bar and on the game screen. This is more relevant here because browsers like to cache way too much stuff. 9. Somewhat redesigned the layout of the game screen to be a bit clearer. Instead of shorthand "RAT" / "NOM" / etc., we have a "RATS: ##" expander, and then all the active buffs / debuffs are visible with their full names under it. This takes up a lot of screen space, so you can collapse it to just show the rat count. 10. The left panel can also shrink MUCH more than before. 11. The position of the grid separator is now saved between runs. 12. If your slot has an alias, we now show that (without the parenthetical slot name) instead of always just showing the official slot name. 13. Chat commands can now be addressed to the rat's alias (with or without the parenthetical slot name) instead of always having to be its slot name, provided that nobody else in the room has picked the same alias. 14. Added a simple chat tab to just send / receive messages in the room, so that you don't HAVE to flip back and forth. It's not quite as fancy as the standard text client, but it should be good enough. 15. Elements that you can interact with all support tab-focusing, and the tooltips as well. 16. When a lot of things happen all at once that the game hasn't animated yet, the app will try to play back everything that happened. This was important when moving to a web app, because browsers don't render things when the tab is in the background or minimized, so when you come back, a LOT of things could have changed. In fact, when LOTS of things changed, it speeds up the playback up to 5x so that you can "catch up" to the current state more quickly. 17. When clicking on an item in the panel to request a hint, the confirmation box now shows up right next to it instead of in the middle of the screen. 18. The "u win." screen now just covers a *part* of the map instead of taking you all the way out. 19. Fix an oversight where the self-host bundle was still expecting to run on `https://autopelago.app` 20. Add a discriminator to the beginning of the title for the benefit of those with multiple tabs 21. #129: Bring back the ability to show the path to the target by clicking on the rat. 22. Fix a minor issue where the rat would face its ultimate target instead of the next location along the route to it. 23. Fix an issue where the rat would go to the nearest user-requested location instead of going in order of when they were requested. 24. (After the failed v0.11.2) probably fix a calculation error in the "show path" calculation? 25. #130: Bring back the ability to personalize your rat. 26. Replace Pixi.js with native elements, which should unblock those getting the error "`CanvasRenderer` is not yet implemented". This also probably brings with it a mixed bag of performance penalties and performance improvements. 27. Fix several ways in which the page could look self-inconsistent while the rat is still catching up to where the server is. 28. Correct the size of the "Personalize Your Rat!" button on the main page for non-Firefox browsers. 29. Remove a brief flicker of the "Personalize Your Rat!" window's header text. It might still sometimes shift, but generally shouldn't have any frames where the text goes outside the window like it did. 30. Add tooltips for the filler squares to show their names, exactly the same as tooltips for landmarks. 31. Add information about known hints onto these tooltips. 32. Move some quest markers out of the way so that they no longer overlap filler squares. 33. Shrink landmark images so that they don't crowd their filler squares. 34. Extra-shrink the hitboxes around the quest markers to make their nearby filler squares easier to get to. 35. Add the ability to "hyper-focus" a location by clicking on it (or pressing Enter on it if you are tabbing through with your keyboard). This "hyper-focus" can only be adjusted by interacting with it in the browser (no chat commands supported, by design) for multiple reasons. 36. #134: Fix an issue where the rat's focused location(s) would get cleared — even if the location wasn't checked — if it happened to land on the location without any actions remaining to make an attempt at checking it. 37. Fix an oversight from 0.11.5 where the animation checkboxes did nothing. - In addition to restoring the original few things that these checkboxes control: 1. Transitions on Food/Energy/Luck bars will be animated (or not) according to the player animation checkbox. 2. Tile examples in the tooltips and the "u win." dialog will be animated (or not) along with the tiles, synchronized to the same frame. 3. The dashed line showing the path from the rat to its target location will be animated (or not) according to the player animation checkbox. 4. The rat token will animate its movement from one location to the next (or not) according to the player animation checkbox. 5. On systems where the user has indicated a [preference for "reduced motion"](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/Reference/At-rules/@media/prefers-reduced-motion#user_preferences), the two checkboxes will be unchecked by default. 38. #143: Stop automatically reconnecting after getting disconnected. This has been resurrecting rooms that had previously timed out, which is rude. Some version of this MAY come back in the future, if I can find a way to detect when it would be OK. 39. #142: The dashed path to the rat's current target will no longer get misaligned and shrunk on games that don't go all the way to Snakes on a Planet. 40. #138: The sidebar now has an extra spot at the beginning that shows the number of all rats. This lets you do the same stuff that the other icons in this panel let you do: click to hint for any rat (i.e., any item in the "Rats" item group) and hover over it to see a tooltip with all the hinted rat locations. 41. Because I kept getting annoyed while testing the previous one, tooltips now stay around when the cursor goes inside them instead of needing the cursor to stay inside the original trigger box. This means that you can now highlight text from these tooltips with your mouse and copy-paste. 42. I might have fixed a bug where sometimes the rat wouldn't send its chat messages immediately, but would wait for some arbitrary event to happen in the future. I have no idea why I wrote it the way I did at first... 43. Whenever we see `{RANDOM_PLAYER}` in any message from your YAML file, we'll replace that with the current alias of a random player. I tried to make this as useful and sensible as I could: - If you are the only player (on your team), it will always just pick you. Otherwise, it will never pick you, but instead: - If any other players (on your team) are connected and haven't completed their goal yet, then it will pick a random one of them. Otherwise, it will pick a random other player (on your team). - If there are multiple `{RANDOM_PLAYER}` placeholders in a single message, then we'll try to pick as many **different** players as possible (in random order still), only repeating a player if there are more placeholders than the number of players allowed by the above rules. To be precise, we sample randomly without replacement from the list until the list is empty, then we refill it and repeat the process until all placeholders have been filled. 44. Fix an oversight that caused messages to get repeatedly processed over and over again. This was most visible when telling the rat to do something: it would go into an infinite loop of acknowledging the request forever. 45. Fix an oversight where a horizontal scroll bar could appear under normal conditions just because of how close certain locations are to the edge. 46. Set the base URL to allow self-hosting it somewhere other than the site root (e.g., if I were to make subpaths like `https://old.autopelago.app/0.11.13` to run that older version). 47. Start looking for the bits that version 1.0.0 of the APWorld will (later!) start to send us to support more flavor items with only Archipelago-side updates. 48. For games with passwords, start encrypting what shows up in the URL bar. There's a lot more to it than that sounds: the encrypted password uses `&W=EncryptedPassword`, but you can still manually plug in `&w=OriginalPassword`. The encryption is there so that you can reload / bookmark the page and still connect to the game just fine, as long as you do so within the same browser profile (i.e., you can't paste your URL from Firefox to Chrome or to someone else's computer, the key is only stored locally).

entry.title: Ratchet & Clank 2 v0.6.4.4
entry.content:
Testing Dynamic PINE ports for multi PCSX2 instance support. Also adds auto connection functionally to the client using patch data, and added the manifest json. Based on: https://github.com/evilwb/APRac2/releases/tag/v0.6.4 v0.6.4.4: Now has UT integrated, and yaml-less support. Works as long as UT is installed. Also fixed some first person logic issues. Thanks to @AmondoVagyok Also added world version to slot data so can see if client isn't matching multiworld gen. Planned: More UT features. "Glitch" logic. Internal or external map. Auto map tab switching. Community suggested logic changes.
### Setup You need every RaC2 option in your `host.yaml` setup. That means: `iso_file` to a valid vanilla iso in your Archipelago directory (should be already from normal setup) `iso_start` to your PCSX2 exe (Make sure to use `/`) `game_ini` to a game settings file in your PCSX2's gamesettings folder. (Usually `%USERPROFILE%/Documents/PCSX2/gamesettings/SCUS-97268_38996035.ini`)
Example: ```yaml rac2_options: # File name of the Ratchet & Clank 2 ISO iso_file: "Ratchet & Clank - Going Commando (USA) (v1.01).iso" # Set this false to never autostart an iso (such as after patching), # Set it to true to have the operating system default program open the iso # Alternatively, set it to a path to a program to open the .iso file with (like PCSX2) iso_start: "C:/Emulators/(PS2) PCSX2/pcsx2-qt.exe" # Set to file path to an existing PCSX2 game setting INI file to have the patcher # create an appropriately named INI with the rest of the patch output. This can be used to # allow you to use you own custom PCSX2 setting with patched ISO. game_ini: "%USERPROFILE%/Documents/PCSX2/gamesettings/SCUS-97268_38996035.ini" ```
Game settings ini example: ```ini [EmuCore] EnablePINE = true PINESlot = 28011
[Achievements] Enabled = false
[MemoryCards] Slot1_Enable = true Slot2_Enable = false Slot1_Filename = APgames.ps2 ``` Recommended you use your settings for vanilla RaC2. But you can make a copy with specific edits. So you can set an AP specific memory card like in the example above. (You don't need to add PINE settings)
For normal setup if you haven't already. Check [GitHub](<https://github.com/evilwb/APRac2/blob/main/docs/setup_en.md>), and [Discord](<https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1325015730218860554/1371288772548755466>).
### Start Simply run a `.aprac2` file with Archipelago. (Recommended to set to open `.aprac2` files with Archipelago by default) Or run the client, and use the `/start` command, and then select your desired `.aprac2` file. (Or drag `.aprac2` into the client) Note: You can rename `aprac2` and patched `iso` but they have to have the same name or it'll make another `iso`. (Same way you have to keep `.apsave`, and their `.zip` name the same if hosting locally)
Changes: <https://github.com/jacobmix/APRac2/compare/v0.6.4.1-PINE-pre...v0.6.4.4?w=1> Full changes: <https://github.com/jacobmix/APRac2/compare/main...v0.6.4.3?w=1>

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Oracle of Seasons v20.0.0
entry.content:
### This apworld is a beta apworld, only compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7 (in RC as of the release of this release)
## 🗳️ New Options * Puzzle and Minigames rando * When randomized, the games are about as hard as vanilla, with 2 less screens for hide & seek * Owl-related puzzles are not affected * No push block is added * Linked Hero's cave can now be made reachable from a warp in the regular hero's cave
## ⏫ Miscellaneous Improvements * Used up gasha spots are now represented with the dug tile * The game now shows which item is being obtained when the item is from a different world * Generation is faster * Asking for `included essences` placed essences will set the placed essences to the number included
## 🧠 Logic * Cane of somaria is now a in-logic way to kill golden beasts (it's decently hard) * Bomb/bombchu requirement is now more consistent, unless there is a consistent way to refill it * 40 bombs are required to fight * 20 bombs are required to destroy bombable tiles * 20 bombs are required for bombjumps * 20 bombchus are required to fight * 40 bombchus are required to destroy tiles * Jumping the goron pits with just a cape has been upgraded from medium to hard logic * Some anti-softlocks have been removed, which affects some of the logic * Added a logic path to leave d2 * Fixed a logic issue where the d8 spinner chest was reachable without magnet glove * Added a hell logic path from frypolar to d8 spinner chest without magnet glove
## 🛠️ Bugfixes * Made use of pre_output, unit tests now work on OoS * Fixed a text at random being broken each seed * Fixed dimitri clipping and respawning at the closed d4 entrance * Melting the red and blue ores, then leaving the room to come back no longer gives hard ore instead of the normal item

entry.title: KeyWe v1.1.0
entry.content:
- Fix for new game update
[Client App](https://github.com/xMcacutt-Archipelago/KeyWe-AP-Client)

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Oracle of Seasons v20.0.1
entry.content:
### This apworld is a beta apworld, only compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7 (in RC as of the release of this release)
## 🗳️ New Options * Puzzle and Minigames rando * When randomized, the games are about as hard as vanilla, with 2 less screens for hide & seek * Owl-related puzzles are not affected * No push block is added * Linked Hero's cave can now be made reachable from a warp in the regular hero's cave
## ⏫ Miscellaneous Improvements * Used up gasha spots are now represented with the dug tile * The game now shows which item is being obtained when the item is from a different world * Generation is faster * Asking for `included essences` placed essences will set the placed essences to the number included
## 🧠 Logic * Cane of somaria is now a in-logic way to kill golden beasts (it's decently hard) * Bomb/bombchu requirement is now more consistent, unless there is a consistent way to refill it * 40 bombs are required to fight * 20 bombs are required to destroy bombable tiles * 20 bombs are required for bombjumps * 20 bombchus are required to fight * 40 bombchus are required to destroy tiles * Jumping the goron pits with just a cape has been upgraded from medium to hard logic * Some anti-softlocks have been removed, which affects some of the logic * Added a logic path to leave d2 * Fixed a logic issue where the d8 spinner chest was reachable without magnet glove * Added a hell logic path from frypolar to d8 spinner chest without magnet glove
## 🛠️ Bugfixes * Made use of pre_output, unit tests now work on OoS * Fixed a text at random being broken each seed * Fixed dimitri clipping and respawning at the closed d4 entrance * Melting the red and blue ores, then leaving the room to come back no longer gives hard ore instead of the normal item

entry.title: Pokemon Stadium v0.5.2
entry.content: Bug fixes - Trainer checks for GLC and Cups, Leader checks for GLC all should be sending now - Visual bugs where stats shown when selecting a Pokémon were incorrect

entry.title: Mega Man Legends v0.2.6
entry.content:
# Changelog
## New Features - Add support for [Colbydude's MMLAP PopTracker](https://github.com/Colbydude/MegaManLegends-AP-Tracker)

entry.title: Hunie Pop 2 v3.0.1
entry.content:
- (Client) fixed processing of "Fruit Seeds" items - (Client) added bunch of debug stuff - (GitHub) added PopTracker to repo and releases V3.0.0 Changelog - (repo) Merged APWorld and Client to one git repository - (APWorld/Client) Added option/logic to randomise girl like/disliked tokens, baggage, unique/shoe gifts - (APWorld) Rebuilt APWorld - (APWorld) Added archipelago.json to APWorld for archipelago 0.7.0 compatibility - (Client) Added BepInEx to zip file for easier installing - (Client) Made arch items in the shop have the archipelago logo - (Client) Removed temp baggage - (Client) Made girl detail screen show what unique/shoe gifts you haven't given yet
BACKUP YOU ORIGINAL SAVE CANT GUARANTEE THAT IT WONT GET CORRUPTED Windows save location: "C:/Users/{YOUR USERNAME}/AppData/LocalLow/HuniePot/HuniePop 2 - Double Date/" Mac save location: "/Users/{YOUR USERNAME}/Library/Application Support/com.HuniePot.HuniePop2-DoubleDate/" CLIENT INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - Have Hunie Pop 2 Installed - Download Hunie Pop 2 Archipelago plugin (See Releases for latest version) - Extract and copy the contents of "Hunie Pop 2 Archipelago plugin.zip" to the directory where "HuniePop 2 - Double Date.exe" is - play and connect to a Archipelago server APWORLD INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - Have Archipelago Launcher Installed (latest release found here: https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases/latest ) - Download Huniepop 2 APWorld (See Releases for latest version) - Select "Install APWorld" in launcher and select Huniepop 2 APWorld you downloaded - Restart launcher for APWorld to properly install - (Optional but Recomended)Select "Generate Template Options" to generate default Huniepop 2 YMAL POPTRACKER INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - copy contents of "Hunie Pop 2 Archipelago PopTracker.zip" into the packs folder in the poptracker install directory

entry.title: YAYARG v2.5.0
entry.content:
## Yet Another YARG AP V2.5.4
### Client Changes - Rework drum compatibility. Five lane and four lane are now interchangeable and able to complete each others pools. Pro and Elite can now complete any drum pool. - Fix nightly build no longer showing filler counts due to menu redesign - Fix nightly not re-selecting the AP menu after completing a song.
### YAML Creator Changes - Fix inclusion lists not being considered when culling songs.
Tested against [YARG nightly b3586](https://github.com/YARC-Official/YARG-Bleedingedge/releases/tag/b3586) ***Newer version may be incompatible.***
This client is compatible with worlds generated on V2.5.0 and up.
Setup Guide: https://github.com/Thedrummonger/Archipelago/blob/YARGV2/worlds/yayarg/docs/guide_en.md

entry.title: Tevi v1.4.16
entry.content: ## Changelog + Teleporter popup missing fixed + DreamKeeper - Money Room X: 24 Y: 21 -> removed unreachable condition (Clusterbomb) + Missing traps fixed (AP) + Missing Potions and other items fixed (AP)

entry.title: Metroid Zero Mission v0.5.2
entry.content:
## Options changes * Fixed a crash from entering nothing for Junk Fill Weights (@gerbiljames)
## Universal Tracker changes * Fixed logic mismatch issues, mostly from not accounting for layout patches correctly * Fixed a generation crash on Mecha Ridley goal
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lilDavid/Archipelago-Metroid-Zero-Mission/compare/0.5.1...0.5.2

entry.title: Wario Land 4 v3.3.3
entry.content:
## Logic changes * Added tricks to clear Monsoon Jungle and get the CD box with grab instead of ground pound
## Options changes * Fixed starting with multiple progressive ground pounds not working
## Universal Tracker changes * UT is now usable without an options yaml * Added support for locations reachable out of logic
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lilDavid/Archipelago-Wario-Land-4/compare/3.3.2...3.3.3

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Oracle of Seasons v20.0.2
entry.content:
### This apworld is a beta apworld, only compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7 (in RC as of the release of this release)
## 🗳️ New Options * Puzzle and Minigames rando * When randomized, the games are about as hard as vanilla, with 2 less screens for hide & seek * Owl-related puzzles are not affected * No push block is added * Linked Hero's cave can now be made reachable from a warp in the regular hero's cave
## ⏫ Miscellaneous Improvements * Used up gasha spots are now represented with the dug tile * The game now shows which item is being obtained when the item is from a different world * Generation is faster * Asking for `included essences` placed essences will set the placed essences to the number included
## 🧠 Logic * Cane of somaria is now a in-logic way to kill golden beasts (it's decently hard) * Bomb/bombchu requirement is now more consistent, unless there is a consistent way to refill it * 40 bombs are required to fight * 20 bombs are required to destroy bombable tiles * 20 bombs are required for bombjumps * 20 bombchus are required to fight * 40 bombchus are required to destroy tiles * Jumping the goron pits with just a cape has been upgraded from medium to hard logic * Some anti-softlocks have been removed, which affects some of the logic * Added a logic path to leave d2 * Fixed a logic issue where the d8 spinner chest was reachable without magnet glove * Added a hell logic path from frypolar to d8 spinner chest without magnet glove
## 🛠️ Bugfixes * Made use of pre_output, unit tests now work on OoS * Fixed a text at random being broken each seed * Fixed dimitri clipping and respawning at the closed d4 entrance * Melting the red and blue ores, then leaving the room to come back no longer gives hard ore instead of the normal item

entry.title: Factorio: Space Age v2.0.2
entry.content:
# Factorio: Space Age apworld v2.0.2
* Fix `filler_count` being ignored. Fixes #13.
download: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/releases . general docs: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/blob/space-age/worlds/factorio_space_age/docs/en_Factorio_Space_Age.md . setup guide: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/blob/space-age/worlds/factorio_space_age/docs/setup_en.md . source code: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/tree/space-age/worlds/factorio_space_age .

entry.title: Slime Rancher v0.2.3
entry.content: - [ApWorld] Minor fixes to logic and location names, there are 2 *possible* incompatible locations from worlds generated with v0.2.2 due to them previously having an extra space - Treasure Pod - Glass Desert Western Ruins - Treasure Pod - Glass Desert Leftside Isle - [Client] (HOPEFULLY) Fixed save errors - [Client] Extended timeout timer from 4s to 60s - [Client] Extended the trap delay range from 30s-60s to 12s-60s - [Client] Fixed a bug where reaching 7Zee lvl 28 would goal regardless of goal type - [Client] Added version number - [Client] Fixed Note Goal being susceptible to collect - [Client] Custom Assets now loads on connect - [Client] Traplink, added support for the following traps: - Banner, Chaser, Clear Image, Disarm, Explosion, Flip Horizontal, Flip Vertical, Frost, Gas, Help, Hey!, Inverted Mouse, Mana Drain, Ninja, Person, Reverse Controls, Sandstorm, Teleport, TNT, Tool Swap, Undo, Whirlpool, Zoom In, Zoom Out - [Client] Forgot to implement the functionality of `Give random traps for unknown traps` - [Client] Made the game tell you when trap linked, and if you have entered an area without an unlock - [Client] Changed how the mod is structured slightly (in preparation for updating to melon 7.2) - IF YOU ARE UPDATING before running the game delete the `Slimipelago.dll` in the `Slime Rancher/Mods/SW_CreeperKing.Slimipelago` folder

entry.title: Dicey Dungeons v0.2.5b0
entry.content:
## What's Changed * Character replacements for "~", "[", "]", "|", and "@" to prevent breakage.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Fylcoast/AP_diceydungeons/compare/v0.2.4-beta...v0.2.5-beta

entry.title: Stardew Valley v7.4.4
entry.content: - Fixed sorting on the Dr Seuss Bundle - Fixed an issue where multiplayervision tags could double up - Updated dependencies

entry.title: Pokemon Crystal v5.4.0
entry.content:
# Changelog
## New Logic Options - **Route 30 Access**: Sets whether the battle on Route 30 ends when talking to Mr. Pokémon or giving the Mystery Egg to Prof. Elm. - **South Kanto Access**: Sets the position of the landslide blocking access to southern Kanto, either Route 19 or Route 21. - **South Kanto Condition**: Sets the condition to remove the landslide, either entering southern Kanto from the unblocked side or restoring power. - **Randomize Pokédex**: Sets whether to include the Pokédex in the randomized item pool, keep it vanilla, or start with it. The Pokédex is required for Dex(count)sanity checks, Pokémon requests and Pokémon trades.
## Co-op - **Event Sync**: Certain events which gate progress in the game will now sync between players on the same slot when Remote Items is enabled. These are: - Number of gyms beaten. - Elms aide being in Violet Pokécenter after beating Falkner. - Access to Azalea gym after clearing Slowpoke well. - Access to Ecruteak gym after releasing the beasts. - Jasmine being in Olivine gym. - Access to Mahogany gym after clearing Rocket Base. - Access to Blackthorn gym after clearing Radio Tower. - Access to Dragon's Den after beating Clair. - Blue being in Viridian gym. - The NPCs returning to the Charcoal Kiln in Azalea after herding Farfetch'd. - Bill being in Goldenrod after meeting him in Ecruteak. - Suicune appearing in the overworld, and being able to receive the Eon Mail from Eusine. - Access to the gift shop in Mahogany Town after clearing Radio Tower. - Restoring power to Kanto. - Which Unown letters you can encounter. - **Tracker Slots**: You can now set a "Tracker Slot" in the game options, setting the equivalent option in the tracker will allow you to autotrack only your own map changes when playing a co-op seed. - Fly unlocks are now Plando'd to their original locations when Randomize Fly Unlocks is off and Remote Items is on, so they are shared between slots.
## New Traps - **Tutorial Trap**: Triggers the catch tutorial. - **Teleport Trap**: Overworld: Teleports to you to your current spawn point. Battle: Uses Teleport as your next move, this works in trainer battles and will force you to switch out. - **Whirlpool Trap**: Overworld: Spins you around and plays soothing Whirlpool sounds. Battle: Traps you in Whirlpool for 99 turns. - **Explosion Trap**: Overworld: Your first party member faints. Battle: Uses Explosion as your next move. - **Sandstorm Trap**: Overworld: Slows you down for a short time. Battle: Creates a Sandstorm which lasts 99 turns. - **Metronome Trap**: Overworld: Triggers a random move-based trap. Battle: Uses Metronome as your next move. - **Ice Trap**: Makes the floor icy for a short time.
## Quality of Life - **Fast Surf**: An in-game option to Surf at Bicycle speed. - **HM Compatibility Override**: An option to override compatibility for specific HMs, for example you can make Fly 100% compatible while all other HMs are 0% compatible (meaning a single species can learn them). - **Move Modernisation**: Allows you to modernise moves to a specific generation from 3-9, choosing buffs only, nerfs only or both. - **Maximum Evolution Level**: Allows specifying the maximum level at which evolutions will start to trigger. - **Base Stats Multiples of 5**: When enabled, attempts to ensure all base stats are multiples of 5 if they are randomized. - **Custom Level Curves**: A set of options which allows defining custom level curves for level scaling to use. - Talking to or calling Prof. Elm will now tell you your goal. - A new page when viewing Pokémon data which shows their base stats and Hidden Power info. - The MORE page in the Pokédex now shows if a Pokémon can be found in the bug catching contest. - Running from the Pokécenter 2F battle will now always succeed. - Blackbelt Kenji on Route 45 will now always be on break when you call him, this was previously random.
## Other Option Changes - **Randomize Item Values**: Randomizes the base cost of items, which can affect their buy price and always affects their sell price. - **Enforce Breeding Methods Logic**: Sets whether the game will only allow you to breed according to your Breeding Methods Required setting. - Weights can now be used in TM Plando. - Trap weights have been combined into a single option, the old options are still accepted for backwards compatibility. - Options which accept lists of Pokémon can now accept types, these will resolve dynamically with type randomization. - Options which accept lists of Pokémon can now accept `_Non-legendaries` which resolves to all non-legendary Pokémon. - Move randomization options have been decoupled so they can now all be provided individually. - All Pokédex locations are now in a location group that is just the Pokémon name, for ease of hinting (thanks @Darvitz). - Lock Kanto Gyms is now disabled when level scaling is enabled.
## Bug Fixes - Fix all exp calculations being slightly incorrect, this was previously causing some split exp to round to 1 for Pokémon with small exp yield. - Fix battling CAL in Viridian City while never having saved instantly ending the battle and causing weird side effects. - Fix level scaling considering the trainers east of Mount Moon in the same sphere as those in Cerulean and on Route 25. - Fix level scaling not considering restoring power to Kanto as a break in spheres. - Prevent invalid items from being used in YAML options. - Prevent Unown from appearing in the wild if you have goal to set to Unown hunt and you priority the Unown dexsanity location. - Fix not being able to wake Snorlax from the two tiles north of it. - Currency symbols in multiworld item names will now map to the Pokédollar symbol. - Fix a generation failure when forcing sphere 1 starters in combination with the Slotlock APWorld. - Only queue a single deathlink when receiving multiple. - The Pokécenter 2F battle will no longer interact with deathlink. - Map `É` in item and player names to `é` ingame, instead of `?`. - Fix fishing encounters on Routes 12, 13 and 32 not appearing in the MORE pages of the Pokédex. - Fix music being inconsistent between loading a save while on the bicycle and getting on the bicycle when music was completely random. - Fix a softlock when receiving a trainer phone call immediately after using Surf in the overworld. - Prevent shop items from being purchasable for below their sell price when set to `item_price`. - Fix Pokédex search returning incorrect results if left or right were input while the cursor was on Search. - Pressing A in Pokédex search while selecting a move now moves the cursor to Search instead of changing the selected move. - Fix Suicune in Cianwood transforming into the player sprite when exiting the building near it.
## Miscellaneous - The Everstone given by Professor Elm after hatching the Togepi egg is now a check, it requires you to show him the species that hatched from the egg, or anything that evolves from it (thanks @snowflav-goob). - Cal in Viridian Trainer House is now a trainersanity check, he is logically locked in the same way as Kanto gyms. - Enabling Apricorns for Shopsanity but not randomizing berry trees will not add the Apricorns to the item pool, their logical source is now their original trees. - New phone traps. - Fiore is now a possible region for hint phone traps (thanks @snowflav-goob). - HM Compatibility is now printed to the spoiler log for HMs that fewer than 20% of Pokémon can learn. - :3

entry.title: NSMBW v0.0.3
entry.content:
# Features * Support all game versions ( untested, report on dc what does not and I will try to fix) * Options (lots of options are now working)
# Bug fixes * Death link Should be working * Lots of other

entry.title: Tevi v1.4.17
entry.content: ## Changelog + Plando fix for locations that required Orb 3 + Start inventory + non randomized upgrades location count fixed

entry.title: evolve_v0.3.14 v0.3.14
entry.content:
# Evolve Incremental v0.3.14
Free - Unstable - APWorld Only
[client](<https://the1stburb.github.io/Evolve>) | [apworld](<https://github.com/the1stburb/EvolveAPWorld>)
# Warning
This release may be bugged, because of the extent of the changes. Mostly, each genus needs to be gone through, but... that is time consuming.
Also i just realized that i completely forgot to make the new options do things on the client...
### Do I need to redownload the APWold?
Yes, but it might be bugged.
## APWorld - Added a new option for choosing your genus, and - Changed the way locations are added, so that genuses with different tech trees dont have impossible locations. - v0.3.12 - Fixed Location: Gantry Cranes not triggering - v0.3.13
## Client - Fixed Power Bonus and Malus not having an effect. - v0.2.7 - Resource Bonus giving NaN amount for Crafting Materials (twice) - v0.2.8 - Fanaticism not working when no previous race selected. - v0.2.9 - Chat Message showing the wrong player (yourself) giving you items, and then duplicating the message - v0.2.11 - Unlocking (most) species, so they can be selected - v0.2.12

entry.title: NSMBW v0.0.4
entry.content: # Bug fixes * Fix so work on frozen install

entry.title: UNBEATABLE Arcade v0.3.0a0
entry.content:
This update brings compatibility with UNBEATABLE version 1.8.2, which broke the mod due to a Unity Engine update.
Additionally, some new stuff was added: - Stages are now included in the randomizer, and are filler items just like characters. - Added an in-game console! Use it to send commands, get hints, or chat with your friends while you can't decide which song to play next. - Upgraded to a newer version of MultiClient.Net which should improve stability when connecting to large multiworlds.
The client is **compatible** with v0.2.x apworlds! You can update even if you have an ongoing async! The **apworld** is **NOT compatible** with v0.2.x clients!
Check [the README](https://github.com/AllPoland/unbeatAP/blob/main/README.md) for installation instructions.
The mod and apworld are both still early in development, and are not feature complete nor are there guarantees about stability.
**Please read the YAML options carefully and test your options before joining a lobby**, since the pacing and difficulty of the apworld is very volatile. It's currently very easy to make a randomizer that is way too short or way too long.
Any feedback or ideas are welcome in the "UNBEATABLE (PC)" thread in `#future-game-design` in the [Archipelago Discord](https://discord.gg/8Z65BR2)!

entry.title: YARGAllSetlists v26.3.29
entry.content:
This release includes version 1.0 of the Guitar Hero World Tour apworld as well as some changes made to every other apworld in this branch.
There is now a provided .zip file containing all of the metadata you need to make your songs work. No more manually editing the text files. I have adjusted the metadata in all of the games I have setup thus far. Your existing metadata may not match the new version and you may need to update some of your songs. Refer to the readme file if you get confused. You will NOT need to create new rips.
# Guitar Hero World Tour Release
Includes the 86 songs found on the retail disc, with an option to enable the Guitar Battles. Toggle "GHWT Guitar Battles" in the "Enabled Setlists" option.
# Guitar Hero 1 version 1.2
Significant metadata changes were made to most of the setlist. You may need to download the metadata zip file.
The "Guitar Hero 1 Hidden Songs" setlist has been renamed to "GH1 Hidden Songs"
# Rock Band 3 version 1.1
Only a couple songs had changes made to their metadata. You will likely be able to get by with just download the individual files directly from the repo.
"Oye Mi Amor" has been made optional due to some versions of the retail disc not ripping the song properly. It is now toggleable within the "Enabled Setlists" option as "RB3 Oye Mi Amor"
# All Setlists version 1.1
- Added YARN Request Pack 1 - Added Guitar Hero World Tour - Added GHWT Guitar Battles - Added the changes made in the other apworlds

entry.title: Vampire Survivors v0.3.2
entry.content: - [ApWorld] Added Yaml option: Include Arcana Enemies in Enemy Sanity, `enemysanity_arcana_enemies` - [ApWorld] Added Yaml option: Character Limiter, `character_pool_size` - [ApWorld] Added Yaml option: Stage Limiter, `stage_pool_size` - [ApWorld] Fixed Genya being listed as a base character - [ApWorld] Fixed Stage Hunt requiring 1 less stage than what you had to goal - [Client] Extended the deathlink grace period to be 10s - if you want it extended, turn off deathlink until you get better at the game - [Client] Fixed beating Eudai not registering

entry.title: MetroCUBEvania v0.2.0
entry.content:
## What's Changed * Convert Inline JS to typescript by @brev95 in https://github.com/ap-metrocubevania/ap-metrocubevania/pull/6
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ap-metrocubevania/ap-metrocubevania/compare/v_0.1.3...v_0.2.0

entry.title: Sonic Adventure DX v1.2.1rc0.post0
entry.content:
## [v1.2.1 pre-release 2] - 2026-03-29
### Changed:
- Updated APCpp to the latest version to improve connection speed and stability. - Entrances used are now written to data storage in bulk and no longer increase loading times.
### Fixed:
- Fixed crash when exiting the Chao Garden from the pause menu. - Fixed crash when using the Surge the Tenrec mod. - Added EC Deck and EC Bridge as starting locations. - Fixed some entrances being revealed early. - Fixed inconsistent emblem requirements between Deck and EC Inside.

entry.title: Schedule I v3.5.4
entry.content:
Rank Bagman III Rank Shot Caller I
Items added: Golden m1911 Golden m1911 unlock big sprinkler big sprinkler unlock

entry.title: CrossCode v0.8.2
entry.content:
# Changes from 0.8.1
## Changes to Generation
* Replaced the check **Vagabond Dojo Key** with **Trials of the Golden Bugs** (@CodeTriangle). * This change turns the check that gives the Dojo Key in vanilla into a quest reward so that the item hidden behind it can be previewed. * This new location has the same ID as the previous one, so this change only affects where in the cutscene the item is acquired.
## Changes to Mod
* Applied a series of changes to the Archipelago menus to make creating and playing games more intuitive (@CodeTriangle): - Allow any NG+ options to be selected regardless of previous save file completion. - No longer load into a game without NG+ enabled when exiting the text client menu using cancel button. - Add a clearer indication that NG+ options can be edited from the New Game Plus menu found in the Archipelago menu. - Block out "carry over" section of NG+ when editing options to indicate that they cannot be modified after save file creation. - Stop the game from blocking infinitely when entering new login information after previously entering login information and disconnecting.
# Changes from 0.8.2-pre.1
## Changes to Logic
* **Steamy Booze** now requires access to Bergen Trail so that Bergen Ice can be acquired (@CodeTriangle). * **Gaia's Garden Defeat** now requires access to East Gaia in Closed Gaia mode since enemies native to that area are necessary to the quest's completion (@CodeTriangle).
